title: Extraction Staging Record
description: Schema for a single chunk extraction staging file written to var/reviewed/. Derived from ExtractionRecord and ExtractionClaimRecord in database_schema.py. All claims have reviewed=false at this stage; the reviewer sets reviewed=true in R4 before DB load.

title.description: Short descriptive title for this passage.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the passage content.

era.description: Era name if stated in the source text; empty string if not determinable.

truth_status.description: Overall epistemic status of the source passage.

region.description: Geographic regions mentioned in the passage.

places.description: Place entity names (resolved to EntityRecord type='place' on DB load).

characters.description: Character entity names (resolved to EntityRecord type='person' on DB load).

factions.description: Faction entity names (resolved to EntityRecord type='faction' on DB load).

key_events.description: Event entity names (resolved to EntityRecord type='event' on DB load).

claims.description: Extracted claims. Each claim must have a verbatim source span (NFR-003).

statement.description: The extracted claim restated in clean prose. Maps to ClaimRecord.claim_text on DB load.

source_span.description: Verbatim quote from the source passage supporting this claim. Must not be empty (NFR-003).

confidence.description: Extraction confidence. Maps to ClaimRecord.confidence on DB load.

reviewed.description: Always false in staging. Set to true by the reviewer in R4.
